sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72521" key="oi)nomu/rsinon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-μύρσινον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wine in oil of myrtles,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:12:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
